                "@type": "Answer",

              }
            },

              "@type": "Question",
              "name": "Are your products authentic Indian ethnic wear?",
              "acceptedAnswer": {
                "@type": "Answer",
                "text": "Absolutely. At LuxeMia, we are committed to preserving Indian textile heritage. Every piece is sourced directly from master craftsmen across India, ensuring authentic designs and high-quality materials."
              }
            },
            {
              "@type": "Question",
              "name": "Can I get custom sizing or alterations for my outfit?",
              "acceptedAnswer": {
                "@type": "Answer",

            },
            {
              "@type": "Question",
              "name": "How can I ensure the color of the outfit is accurate when viewing online?",
              "acceptedAnswer": {
                "@type": "Answer",
                "text": "We strive for accurate color representation in our product photography. However, slight color variations may occur due to screen settings and lighting. We recommend reviewing all available product images and descriptions."

            },

              "@type": "Question",
              "name": "Do I need to pay customs duties or taxes on international orders?",
              "acceptedAnswer": {
                "@type": "Answer",
                "text": "While LuxeMia offers free shipping, customers are responsible for any customs duties, taxes, or import fees levied by their country of residence. Please check with your local customs office for more information."

              }
            }
          ]
